title: Doe manifest-shape simfabric wall-clock ceiling
description: Schema for `config/manifest-simfabric-budget.json`. The ceiling file is consumed by `bench/tools/check_simfabric_budget_gate.py` as the rung-8 launch precondition: the predicted simfabric wall-clock budget (rung 2 receipt at `bench/out/r3-1-31b-manifest-simfabric-predicted-wallclock/budget.json`) must be calibrated AND under the ceiling before the manifest-shape full-graph dispatch is allowed. Until rung 3 supplies the throughput calibration constant, `calibrationStatus` is `<bootstrap-pending-rung-3>` and the gate refuses launch regardless of numeric ceiling.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this schema. Currently 1.

artifactKind.description: Receipt class identifier; used by aggregation tooling.

calibrationStatus.description: State of the throughput calibration that backs the numeric ceilings. `<bootstrap-pending-rung-3>` means the values were chosen before any rung-3 calibration receipt landed; the gate denies launch in this state. Once rung 3 produces a calibration constant, set to a sha256 hex digest of the rung-3 receipt that supplied it.

calibrationSourcePath.description: Optional repo-relative path to the rung-3 receipt that produced the calibration constant. Recorded once `calibrationStatus` is a sha256.

ceilings.description: Per-aggregate cycle ceilings. The gate compares the rung-2 receipt's `grandPredictedCycles` against `grandPredictedCycles` here, and (when both sides are present) each phase's `predictedCycles` against `perPhase[phase]`.

grandPredictedCycles.description: Hard ceiling on `grandPredictedCycles` from the rung-2 budget receipt. The receipt's value must be ≤ this number for the gate to allow launch.

perPhase.description: Optional per-phase ceiling map (e.g. `{ "prefill": ..., "decode": ... }`). When present, each phase's `predictedCycles` is compared against the corresponding entry; unknown phases fall through to the grand-total ceiling.

rationale.description: Free-form note explaining how the ceiling was derived (which simfabric runner timeout it tracks, what calibration receipt set it).
